title: Screen Replacement
description: LCD panel cracked during transit. Replacement panel ordered from HP authorized service center.
notes: Part ETA: 3-5 business days. Temporary loaner issued.

title: Annual Maintenance Service
description: Scheduled annual preventive maintenance including toner replacement, roller cleaning, and calibration.

title: Firmware Update & Security Patching
description: Critical security patch and firmware update for Cisco IOS XE. Requires maintenance window during off-hours.
notes: Schedule during 2-4 AM window. Notify all users 24h ahead.

title: 60,000 km Service
description: Comprehensive 60,000 km service including oil change, brake pads, filters, and full inspection.
notes: All checks passed. Next service at 80,000 km.

title: End-of-Life Assessment
description: Inspection to determine if asset should be repaired, repurposed, or disposed of.
notes: Battery at 42% health. Screen ghosting issue. Recommended for disposal.

title: Print Head Calibration & Nozzle Cleaning
description: Quarterly maintenance cycle: nozzle deep clean, bed leveling, belt tension check, firmware update.
notes: Lab will be unavailable for 4 hours during maintenance.

title: RAID Controller Failure — Emergency Repair
description: RAID controller showed degraded status. Hot spare activated. Controller replaced under warranty.
notes: Warranty covered. No data loss. Array rebuilt in 6 hours.

title: Lamp Replacement
description: Projector lamp reaching end of rated lifespan (4800/5000 hours). Replacement lamp ordered.
notes: Projector still functional but brightness reduced by ~30%.

title: Intermittent Connectivity Drops
description: Users reporting WiFi drops every 30-45 minutes. Diagnostics show potential hardware failure.

title: Annual Fire Safety Inspection
description: Mandatory annual inspection per fire safety regulations. Pressure check, seal verification, and certification renewal.
notes: Must be completed before August 15 deadline.
